title: Inhibitor Switch, Accelerator Switch, Accelerator Position Switch, Stop Lamp Switch and Engine Speed Signal Circuit Checks (Cont'd)

figures_detected.associated_step: B - Check engine speed signal circuit

figures_detected.associated_step: B - Check engine speed signal circuit - voltage measurement

content_blocks.text: Inhibitor Switch, Accelerator Switch, Accelerator Position Switch, Stop Lamp Switch and Engine Speed Signal Circuit Checks (Cont'd)

nodes.text:
B — Check engine speed signal circuit
1. Start engine
2. Select "DATA MONITOR" / Read "ENGINE RPM" / Check change in engine speed according to throttle opening
— OR —
Check voltage between N-CVT control unit terminal #22 and body ground
Voltage: 0.9 to 4.5 V
Perform self diagnosis after test drive

Check following items:
• Check continuity between N-CVT control unit terminal #22 and engine control unit terminal #2
• Perform engine control unit self diagnosis. (Refer to section EF & EC)

1. Check N-CVT control unit I/O signals
2. Re-check N-CVT control unit pin terminals for damage or incorrect connection of control unit harness connector

items.label: Voltage between N-CVT control unit terminal #22 and body ground

model_notes: Applicable to N-CVT (Nissan Continuously Variable Transmission) equipped vehicles
